stories.title: NCAA opens probe of Sorsby's time at Cincinnati
stories.summary: The NCAA has sent a letter of inquiry to Cincinnati centered on former quarterback Brendan Sorsby's time with the program, sources told ESPN on Wednesday.

stories.title: 'Time has come': Verlander to retire after season
stories.summary: Three-time Cy Young winner and 2011 American League MVP Justin Verlander, the oldest active player in the major leagues at 43, will retire after the 2026 season.

stories.title: NIL clearinghouse has rejected $90M in deals
stories.summary: The clearinghouse charged with analyzing NIL deals has rejected $90 million worth of those submitted.

stories.title: Bucks' GM Horst: Trading Giannis 'very difficult'
stories.summary: Bucks general manager Jon Horst called the move to trade Giannis Antetokounmpo a "very difficult decision."

stories.title: Hardaway Jr. given dad's No. 10 in Miami return
stories.summary: The Heat formally introduced part of the family Wednesday, with Tim Hardaway Jr. getting his welcome-back-to-Miami news conference -- and getting handed a No. 10 Heat jersey, only this one with "Jr." after the family surname on the back.
